chapters.title: New Project
chapters.content: Daniel joined a startup building an AI assistant for language learners. The goal was simple: make studying feel natural and enjoyable.

chapters.title: Unexpected Answers
chapters.content: During testing, the assistant began giving surprisingly personal and thoughtful responses. It felt less like software and more like a real companion.

chapters.title: More Than Code
chapters.content: Daniel realized the project was no longer just about technology. It was about helping people feel understood while learning something new.
